name: Quest? Quest!
short_description: Become the hero of this totally not suspicious fantasy kingdom. Learn the adventuring ropes from a mighty knight and fight monsters and dragons to save the day - but remember - the most important parts of being a hero are bravery, heroism and not asking too many questions.
detailed_description:
Overview


Become the hero of this totally not suspicious fantasy kingdom. Learn the adventuring ropes from a mighty knight and fight monsters and dragons to save the day - but remember - the most important parts of being a hero are bravery, heroism and not asking too many questions.

Features


  • Over 31 unique enemies to fight.
  • More than makes up for an apparent lack of quality with sparkling wit and puddles of character.
  • Remarkably generic but still adequate story-line.
  • Absolutely no twists or turns.
  • If anyone tells you that more interesting things happens in this game just ignore them.
  • Just cut them out of your life.
  • Also, this whole game was basically made by one guy.
  • I did get some help with the music and some small coding things.
  • But beside that it was all me.
